'''chatuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldgen|oldgen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldgen|oldgen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chatuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætithith|chætithith]] || [[word:chætithij|chætithij]] || [[word:chætithish|chætithish]] || [[word:chætithi|chætithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatututhuth|chatututhuth]] || [[word:chatututhuj|chatututhuj]] || [[word:chatututhush|chatututhush]] || [[word:chatututhu|chatututhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatuthuth|chatuthuth]] || [[word:chatuthuj|chatuthuj]] || [[word:chatuthush|chatuthush]] || [[word:chatuthu|chatuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatufthuth|chatufthuth]] || [[word:chatufthuj|chatufthuj]] || [[word:chatufthush|chatufthush]] || [[word:chatufthuf|chatufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatuthuthu|chatuthuthu]] || [[word:chatuthuju|chatuthuju]] || [[word:chatuthushu|chatuthushu]] || [[word:chatuthuku|chatuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatuthuth|chatuthuth]] || [[word:chatuthuj|chatuthuj]] || [[word:chatuthush|chatuthush]] || [[word:chatuthu|chatuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatuthuthul|chatuthuthul]] || [[word:chatuthujul|chatuthujul]] || [[word:chatuthushul|chatuthushul]] || [[word:chatuthukul|chatuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatuthuthuthu|chatuthuthuthu]] || [[word:chatuthujuju|chatuthujuju]] || [[word:chatuthushushu|chatuthushushu]] || [[word:chatuthuku|chatuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatuthuthun|chatuthuthun]] || [[word:chatuthujun|chatuthujun]] || [[word:chatuthushun|chatuthushun]] || [[word:chatuthukun|chatuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatuthuthuoro|chatuthuthuoro]] || [[word:chatuthujuoro|chatuthujuoro]] || [[word:chatuthushuoro|chatuthushuoro]] || [[word:chatuthukuoro|chatuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
